compounds.frequency: once a week on Saturday night (current maintenance)

benefits.description: Getting a nice colour base without much sun exposure on MT2. MT1 did not give any colour.

side_effects.description: Shitty sleep on MT2; also had sleep issues on MT1
Wished she had increased libido from MT2 but did not experience it

protocol_notes: Naturally very fair-skinned. MT1 gave no colour and caused sleep issues. Switched to MT2. Toughed out sleep disruption and now dosing once a week on Saturday nights; takes it with a couple glasses of wine to help with sleep issues. Planning to increase sun exposure.
